headlines.title: Republicans unveil proposed congressional map that carves up Tennessee's lone Democratic district
headlines.description: Republican legislative leaders in Tennessee on Wednesday released a congressional map proposal they are hoping to put in place before the midterm elections that would eliminate the state's only Democratic-controlled district

headlines.title: Howard Lutnick evasive during Epstein testimony, House Democrats say
headlines.description: Howard Lutnick said he stopped talking to Jeffrey Epstein in 2005. But a House inquiry wants to know why investigatory files show otherwise.

headlines.title: FBI searches office of Virginia lawmaker who helped lead redistricting push
headlines.description: The FBI on Wednesday searched the office of a prominent Virginia Democratic state lawmaker who helped spearhead the state's redistricting push

headlines.title: Commerce Secretary Lutnick answers House’s questions on Epstein investigation
headlines.description: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick testified in a closed hearing before the House Oversight Committee regarding his connections to the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. Democratic lawmakers raised concerns about the lack of video recording, arguing that the public should be able to view his interview. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin reports on Lutnick’s appearance before the committee.

headlines.title: Trump comments on Iran talks while meeting with UFC fighters
headlines.description: During an event with UFC fighters at the White House, President Trump says the U.S. and Iran continue to negotiate a peace deal. Trump touts the "regime change" in Iran and defends the U.S. "excursion" in the region.

headlines.title: Ted Turner reflects on CNN and his life: Meet the Press Archive
headlines.description: NOV. 30, 2008 — CNN founder Ted Turner joined Meet the Press around the release of his autobiography “Call Me Ted.” Turner passed away on May 6, 2026, aged 87.

headlines.title: The front-runners to lead Bernie Sanders' grassroots movement in 2028
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: Anger and despair among Jewish Britons after spate of attacks
headlines.description: LONDON — Britain in 2026 is a place where Jack Hur doesn’t feel safe wearing his Star of David pendant.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Democrats keep control of Michigan state Senate after special election win
headlines.description: Democrat Chedrick Greene has won a special state Senate election in Michigan, NBC News projects, ensuring his party will keep control of the closely divided chamber in a key battleground state

headlines.title: Trump exacts revenge in Indiana over redistricting vote, with five GOP legislators defeated
headlines.description: A majority of the seven state senators on the ballot Tuesday who faced Trump-backed challengers lost their primaries, NBC News projects.

headlines.title: Republicans fill out the House battlefield with challengers in key districts
headlines.description: The November battle for control of the House is coming into focus in Tuesday’s primaries, as Republicans pick nominees to challenge Democratic incumbents in Ohio and Indiana
